taxon	lfc_(Intercept)	lfc_dietvegan	se_(Intercept)	se_dietvegan	W_(Intercept)	W_dietvegan	p_(Intercept)	p_dietvegan	q_(Intercept)	q_dietvegan	diff_(Intercept)	diff_dietvegan	passed_ss_(Intercept)	passed_ss_dietvegan	diff_robust_(Intercept)	diff_robust_dietvegan
